_comment: Example output shape for ONE finding. Your agent should emit a record like this for every gap it detects when it assesses a company against a current regulatory requirement. Cite the source you used. Swap in your own Twilio test number for the alert.
requirement: Light-means-of-transport (LMT) batteries must carry a digital battery passport.
gap: LMT e-scooter battery is sold in the EU with no battery passport / data carrier.
recommended_action: Create the battery passport (QR + data carrier) and link it before the deadline.

alert.message: RideVolt: your e-Scooter Battery Pack 280Wh needs an EU battery passport by 18 Feb 2027 (Reg 2023/1542). Set up the QR/data carrier. Source: eur-lex.europa.eu
